{
    "cli": "autograder.cli.logs.query",
    "arguments": [
        '--user', 'server-admin@test.edulinq.org',
        '--pass', 'server-admin',
        '--level', 'TRACE',
        '--config', 'use_testing_logs=true',
        '--format', 'table',
    ],
}
---
timestamp	level	message	error	course	assignment	user
100	TRACE	Trace Course Log		course101	hw0	course-other@test.edulinq.org
150	TRACE	Trace Server Log				server-user@test.edulinq.org
200	DEBUG	Debug Course Log		course101	hw0	course-student@test.edulinq.org
250	DEBUG	Debug Server Log				server-creator@test.edulinq.org
300	INFO	Info Course Log		course101	hw0	course-grader@test.edulinq.org
350	INFO	Info Server Log				server-admin@test.edulinq.org
400	WARN	Warn Course Log	Course Warning	course101	hw0	course-admin@test.edulinq.org
450	WARN	Warn Server Log	Server Warning			server-owner@test.edulinq.org
500	ERROR	Error Course Log	Course Error	course101		course-owner@test.edulinq.org
550	ERROR	Error Server Log	Server Error			
600	FATAL	Fatal Course Log		course101		
650	FATAL	Fatal Server Log
